description: Configure how Cost Center obtains capability prices. Use your Account Rate Card (via OAuth client credentials) or the Dynatrace default rate card.

items.description: Fetch your contract prices from the Account Management API

rate_card_type.description: Choose 'Account Rate Card' to fetch your real contract prices from the Account Management API (requires the OAuth fields below). Choose 'Default Rate Card' to use Dynatrace public list prices — no credentials needed.

account_id.description: Your Dynatrace Account UUID. Find it at https://myaccount.dynatrace.com → it is the UUID in the page URL (account/<UUID>), or under Account Management → Account settings. Paste only the UUID, WITHOUT the 'urn:dtaccount:' prefix.

client_id.description: Create an OAuth client at https://myaccount.dynatrace.com → Identity & access management → OAuth clients → Create client. Grant the permission 'Account UAC read' (account-uac-read). After creating, copy the Client ID (starts with 'dt0s02.').

client_secret.description: The Client Secret shown ONCE when you create the OAuth client above. If you lost it, generate a new secret for the same client. Stored encrypted; re-enter it whenever you save changes.

sso_url.description: OAuth token endpoint. Production tenants: keep the default. Sprint/dev tenants: use https://sso-sprint.dynatracelabs.com/sso/oauth2/token.

account_api_base.description: Base URL of the Account Management API. Production: keep the default https://api.dynatrace.com.

subscription_id.description: Optional. Used to read Dynatrace's authoritative total cost from the Platform Subscription API. Leave empty to auto-discover the first subscription. Find it via GET /sub/v2/accounts/{account}/subscriptions.

annual_commitment.description: Optional. Annual commitment amount (in your billing currency) shown in Account Management → Budget summary. Only needed if the Subscription API does not expose the budget automatically — powers the Budget strip on the Billing tab.

constraints.customMessage: For security reasons please re-enter the client secret to save the configuration.
